name: For Loop
description: Generates a sequence of numbers. Connect exec_out to start downstream processing.
python_code:
import asyncio
async def execute(self, inputs):
    start = int(inputs.get('start', 0))
    end = int(inputs.get('end', 10))
    step = int(inputs.get('step', 1))
    
    indices = list(range(start, end, step))
    self.log_info(f"Generated range: {start} to {end}")
    
    # Trigger ONLY exec_out to start the loop
    # Downstream Loop Body will trigger its own finished pin
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    
    return {'indices': indices, 'current_index': indices[-1] if indices else 0}
